name: timestamp
description: UTC observation timestamp used with site_id as the MERGE key.

name: dateAndTime
description: Formatted timestamp mirror for legacy _s2_filt_1 compatibility.

name: NEE
description: Pre-gap-fill net ecosystem exchange preserved from silver.

name: NEE_f
description: Gap-filled NEE from the selected eddy backend.

name: Rg
description: Incoming shortwave radiation preserved from silver.

name: VPD
description: Vapor pressure deficit preserved from silver.

name: nee_f
description: Lowercase mirror of NEE_f for legacy _s2_filt_1 compatibility.

name: QC_NEE
description: Silver QC column preserved into gold.

name: H
description: Silver sensible heat flux preserved into gold.

name: qc_H
description: Silver QC class for H when present.

name: LE
description: Silver latent heat flux preserved into gold.

name: qc_LE
description: Silver QC class for LE when present.

name: P_RAIN
description: Silver precipitation column preserved into gold.

name: rH
description: Canonical source relative humidity preserved into gold.

name: rH_norm_s
description: Derived/normalized silver humidity column preserved into gold when present.
